goal: Add a side-effect-free permit issue preflight builder for approved runtime patch authority decisions while keeping permit issuance, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, runtime execution, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not issue permits, apply runtime patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, run runtime execution, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Approved runtime patch authority decisions can be preflighted for permit issue without issuing a permit.
Preflight, issuer, and issue policy refs are required.
Runtime execution remains false and disallowed.
assumptions: Actual permit issuance, patch application, and execution require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing preflight ref, and rejected decision cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Permit issuance, runtime patch application, server mutation, route mutation, runtime execution, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-105 approved runtime patch authority decisions without issuing a permit or enabling execution.
